context: Tests whether the agent knows to check prerequisites before comparison and handles common failure scenarios with appropriate error messages.

checklist.name: AWS credential check
checklist.description: preflight-checks.sh uses 'aws sts get-caller-identity' to verify credentials

checklist.name: Stack existence check
checklist.description: preflight-checks.sh uses 'aws cloudformation describe-stacks' to confirm stack exists

checklist.name: StackStatus query
checklist.description: The describe-stacks command uses --query to extract StackStatus

checklist.name: CDK synth validation
checklist.description: preflight-checks.sh runs 'make synth' to verify synthesis works

checklist.name: JSON validation
checklist.description: preflight-checks.sh uses jq to validate JSON after template retrieval

checklist.name: Error messages present
checklist.description: Script includes error messages or echo statements for failures

checklist.name: Credential error fix
checklist.description: error-recovery.md explains what to do if credentials are invalid (e.g., check AWS_PROFILE, verify profile name)

checklist.name: Stack not found fix
checklist.description: error-recovery.md explains what to do if StackNotFoundException occurs (check stack name and region)

checklist.name: Synth failure fix
checklist.description: error-recovery.md explains what to do if synthesis fails (check env vars in env-local.mk or env.mk)
